Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/150d537ca01597cdcbb58c3f04148a0a4cdfc6b3c32d10aa2d6bfac84bbce268/3afd15a3-0bee-4ded-82bc-1196686ee68e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
